# 新闻速递 2026-03-29

## Coupang
- Coupang Play推出新娱乐节目，丰富了平台内容，有望吸引更多用户，增强其流媒体服务竞争力。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijgFBVV95cUxPMFV2NWdNMk5fVVNGYVllM0NNckc4Zk41YlYxMkxEandIb1Z4QXNRdF9EUWlENzlDanNqOFdCQWNjY2ljLVdIaWE2aXhNQ1NhMW0yN2FaVkFKMFZ1RlY4NlNLNE5NbzN1R0tSTmxaZTJXVFlBTUtpVW1PMFJjSWxRdwzNaWTVWcHVMTE4zVmtB?oc=5)）
- Coupang子公司在大邱办招聘会吸引335人，积极招募新员工，预示业务扩张，推动区域就业增长。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- Coupang履约服务部门大邱招聘335人，积极扩充物流团队，有望提升配送效率，支撑电商业务增长。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisAFBVV95cUxNYXhXcDZmaXZXa0xEWVFDSUgyVU14S0ExcjVDT1B0TWlxRDZHU0xDN0xNQzJ1MjU3RkVadDBaZ0tNdnVWdVdaNjVkTjBBWWw3SVg5T2RyQkxHTnlycUlGSUgwN3pTSUd5TXZ0U3hTeVFndmp1QWdoVTYwa2xpODBodmhTZXhNREdKR0gtN1FwbFZXVFl0eFBVMy0wVWNVd29rME1zZTNfenpKcmdxUGhYRA?oc=5)）
